final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement mockup for OPPO Find X9 Ultra new product launch, designed as a brand-exposure banner for web/social feed display.

Style/medium: full-screen smartphone screenshot mockup, premium brand launch ad
Composition: full-bleed vertical layout, hero product centered, bold typographic headline dominating upper or lower third for maximum visual impact
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone as hero product, new launch announcement
Scene/backdrop: dramatic dark or deep-space backdrop to amplify product presence
Lighting/mood: high-contrast dramatic lighting on device, strong visual impact, aspirational brand energy
Color palette: OPPO brand tones — deep black or midnight base with metallic silver/gold accents
Materials/textures: glass and metal device surface with specular highlights, premium finish
Text (verbatim): OPPO Find X9 Ultra
Constraints: 1080×1920 portrait format, full-screen ad composition, brand-exposure priority, no UI chrome or status bar overlays obscuring the hero
Avoid: cluttered layout, low-contrast text, generic tech-ad stock aesthetic, watermarks
